name: compliance closed-loop step rule-to-provenance verifies the rule provenance includes the controls field
command: mkdir -p active-rules && printf 'rule_id: no-eval\ncontrols: [{framework: nist-csf-2, control_id: GV.OC}]\n' > active-rules/no-eval.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/closed-loop-test.sh" --step rule-to-provenance --rules-dir active-rules 2>out.txt && grep -q 'control=GV.OC present_on_rule=no-eval' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
